commit_scope: Close the stale form-cli model-lane missing rows by promoting observed tokenizer, GGUF map, Metal weight/runtime, autoregressive loop, and ask-staged model-call receipts into synthesis-status while leaving decoded prose answer binding as the only missing row.

commands: bin/form-cli ask "what remains missing after ask-staged-model-call witness: tokenizer carrier full GGUF Metal autoregressive decoded text binding"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/text-tokenize.fk form-stdlib/rag-embed.fk form-stdlib/rag-index-codec.fk form-stdlib/rag-retrieve.fk form-stdlib/rag-ask.fk form-stdlib/form-cli-ask.fk form-stdlib/line-grammar.fk form-stdlib/voice-traits.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/mesh-dispatch.fk form-stdlib/surprise-salience.fk form-stdlib/host-sense-organ.fk form-stdlib/speech-organ.fk form-stdlib/native-host-instance.fk form-stdlib/resource-port.fk form-stdlib/bml-native-interface-package-import.fk form-stdlib/hati-os-targets.fk form-stdlib/form-native-resource-interfaces.fk form-stdlib/form-fs.fk form-stdlib/storage-port.fk form-stdlib/host-kernel-carrier.fk form-stdlib/fnri-standin.fk form-stdlib/fnri-receipt.fk form-stdlib/form-cli.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-cli-band.fk
scripts/form_cli_ask_staged_model_call.sh "ask staged model call after bootstrap refresh" .cache/body-test-receipts/current-ask-staged-model-call-receipt.json
observed_outputs: Form-first query returned native miss plus model-call receipt path, preserving the pending synthesis boundary.
standard lane smoke copied bootstrap/darwin-arm64 with no clang and synthesis-status reported observed components plus missing:decoded-prose-answer-binding.
validate_form_cli_local_receipts.sh substrate -> PASS: local grounded ask and pending synthesis receipts are honest.
full composition receipt -> pass_composition_receipt_full_inference_not_yet_composed; synthesis_boundary.missing=[decoded-prose-answer-binding]; all observed composition gates true on this Mac host.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push and PR CI, including Windows Host Floor for the regenerated form-cli source.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: form-cli model-status and synthesis-status no longer report tokenizer-carrier, full-gguf-weight-map-to-metal, autoregressive-loop-binding, or ask-staged-model-call as missing once local receipts observe those components; the only remaining model-lane blocker is decoded-prose-answer-binding.
test_flows: four-way form-cli-band validates synthesis-status at 16383 with observed model-lane pieces and missing:decoded-prose-answer-binding
standard-lane bootstrap smoke copies bootstrap/darwin-arm64 without clang and emits the narrowed synthesis-status
model-gap receipt validates tokenizer carrier, GGUF weight map, autoregressive loop, and ask-staged model call as observed while decoded prose answer binding remains pending
full composition receipt keeps full_model_inference_composed=false and records synthesis_boundary.missing=[decoded-prose-answer-binding]

deploy_validation.notes: This is a CLI/Form/bootstrap artifact change; public deploy verification follows merge if deploy path filters trigger.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof passed; evidence validation, rebase, guard, PR, CI, merge, and post-merge verification remain.

evidence_refs: The old missing rows tokenizer-carrier, full-gguf-weight-map-to-metal, autoregressive-loop-binding, and ask-staged-model-call are no longer emitted as model-status missing rows.
The status surface now reports observed components and narrows the remaining synthesis gap to decoded-prose-answer-binding.
The full composition receipt now includes ask_staged_model_call_witness=true and keeps full_model_inference_composed=false.
The standard-lane bootstrap artifacts were regenerated so c-bootstrapped form-cli carries the updated synthesis-status without a runtime compiler/toolchain path.
